tutorial.slide1Body: If you have something you don't understand, post it via "+ Ask a question". Once posted, AI will try to answer first. If it's confident enough, the AI's answer is shown as-is.
tutorial.slide2Title: When AI can't, a human steps in
tutorial.slide2Body: Questions the AI can't confidently answer are automatically matched with an expert whose skill tags fit, and a human will answer. Humans fill the gaps AI leaves behind.
tutorial.slide3Body: If two experts still can't solve it, the question is published as a "hard question" to everyone. Your knowledge might save someone. Let's help the asker.

hardPage.title: Hard questions
hardPage.subtitle: Questions neither AI nor experts could answer. Can you solve them with your knowledge?

questionForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Hydration error when SSR-ing with Next.js
questionForm.bodyPlaceholder: Describe the problem, what you've tried, error messages, etc. (Markdown supported)
questionForm.similarQuestionsFound: Similar questions already exist — check the solved ones too
questionForm.similarStillOpen: If they still don't solve it, you can go ahead and post.
questionForm.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 5 characters
questionForm.bodyTooShort: Details must be at least 30 characters
questionForm.submitFailed: Failed to post. Please try again.

howItWorksPage.title: How it works
howItWorksPage.intro1: A service that connects specialized or personal questions AI struggles with to real human experts.
howItWorksPage.intro2: A second-opinion service that AI can't provide — exactly what's needed in the age of AI.
howItWorksPage.loginNote: You need to log in with a Google account to ask a question.
howItWorksPage.step1Description: Post the problem you want solved. AI first checks whether it fits the site's genre and won't accept it if not. You can post up to 3 questions per day.
howItWorksPage.step2Description: AI tries to answer first. If it's confident, its answer is shown as-is; otherwise, it moves to the next step.
howItWorksPage.step2Note: AI is tuned against hallucination, but its content isn't guaranteed to be accurate. Please verify important decisions yourself.
howItWorksPage.step3Description: An expert whose skills match your question's keywords gets notified. If their answer solves it, pick it as the best answer. If it doesn't, or no answer arrives within 8 hours, you can ask a second expert (escalate) or publish it as a hard question for everyone to help solve.
howItWorksPage.step4Description: If the first expert couldn't solve it, it's handed off to a second expert. It automatically moves to a hard question if there's no answer within 8 hours.
howItWorksPage.step5Description: Questions neither AI, the first expert, nor the second expert could solve are published to everyone as a "hard question". Everyone, please help with your knowledge.
howItWorksPage.step6Description: Once the asker picks a best answer from the responses, the question is marked solved. The responder's track record grows.
howItWorksPage.expertStep1: Log in with a Google account
howItWorksPage.expertStep2: Set your skill tags on My Page
howItWorksPage.expertStep4: With email notifications on, you'll be notified when matched with a question

answerForm.heading: Post an answer
answerForm.bodyPlaceholder: Share your experience and knowledge to help the asker. (30+ characters)
answerForm.tooShort: Answer must be at least 30 characters
answerForm.submitFailed: Failed to post. Please try again.

questionActions.rematchConfirm: Didn't this solve it? We'll ask the next expert. Continue?
questionActions.escalateConfirm: Escalate to a hard question? It will be published to everyone to help solve it.
questionActions.escalateButton: Escalate to a hard question for everyone to help
questionActions.giveUpConfirm: Give up? It will be handed off to the next person. If you're the second expert, it becomes a hard question.

questionPage.aiAnsweredBody: Check the answer below. If it solves your problem, click "Accept as best answer".
questionPage.matchedBody: Please wait for a reply (it automatically moves to the next step if there's no response within 8 hours).
questionPage.pendingBody: Please wait a moment. (Reload this page to check the status.)
questionPage.similarSolved: Similar questions have been solved — might be helpful
questionPage.hardBannerBody: Neither AI nor experts could solve this. Please help with your knowledge and experience.
questionPage.expiredMessage: The answer deadline has passed, so this question is no longer accepting answers.
questionPage.alreadyAnswered: ✓ You answered. Please wait for the asker to review it.
questionPage.waitingForMatch: Currently being matched with an expert. Please wait a moment.
questionPage.noExpertBannerBody: No expert is currently available for matching. Please help with your knowledge and experience.
questionPage.askToAnswer: Please solve this question with your knowledge and experience. We're counting on your answer!
questionPage.ownerRematchHasAnswerTitle: Expert #1's answer has arrived. What would you like to do?
questionPage.ownerRematchHasAnswerBody: If it solves your problem, click "Accept as best answer". If not, you can ask the next expert or escalate to a hard question for everyone.
questionPage.ownerRematchNoAnswerBody: You can ask the next expert or escalate to a hard question.
questionPage.ownerEscalateTitle: Two experts worked on this but it wasn't solved.
questionPage.ownerEscalateBody: Escalating to a hard question publishes it to everyone to help solve it.
questionPage.ownerMatchedCWaiting: Waiting on the second expert. Depending on their answer, you can escalate to a hard question.
questionPage.ownerMatchedCWaitingNote: If the answer solves it, accept it as the best answer. It automatically escalates to a hard question if there's no answer within 8 hours.
questionPage.ownerHasAnswers: An answer has arrived. Please review it and pick the best answer.
questionPage.translationNotice: This content has been automatically translated by AI.
